Acronym.Name: wh
Acronym.Description: work history (length of time in months)

Category.Description: tax self employment taxation: joint business and entrepreneurs,
tax self employment taxation: eva payers
at risk of poverty & low work intensity
at risk of poverty & material deprivation
at risk of poverty & material deprivation & low work intensity
